semanticOwner: TaxKit product owner with the apps/docs public-doc owner
evidence: The source receipt records that apps/docs/navigation.json and all 61 tracked public MDX files declare draft.
apps/docs/navigation.schema.json accepts a string status but does not define draft semantics.
docs/README.md separates public docs from maintainer-document lifecycle policy.
rejectedAlternatives: Treat draft as proof that the public site is unpublished or unavailable; local content metadata cannot establish external availability.
Treat draft as accepted current public truth; no product-owner decision defines that consequence.
Change public MDX or navigation status in this decision-draft slice.
acceptedOrDefaultBehavior: Preserve the existing draft metadata and navigation in place. Until the named owners define draft semantics, downstream controls must treat it as an unresolved public-content lifecycle marker and must not infer publication, accuracy, availability, or an accepted-current state from it.

taskBlocking.inheritedNonClaim: No semantic public-doc lifecycle or public availability is established.
Journey proof cannot treat draft metadata as public-runtime proof.
Automation cannot enforce an unchosen draft consequence.

authorityImpact: Only the named product owner and public-doc owner may choose the semantic consequence of draft; this local record grants no public-site, provider, publication, or deployment authority.
nonClaims: Draft metadata does not prove public publication, unpublication, runtime availability, correctness, or user visibility.
This record does not change any public MDX, navigation, generated source, or docs runtime.
carryingCost: Keep the unresolved marker visible in HGI-202 and HGI-205 planning and recheck the metadata inventory when its semantics are chosen.
reviewOrResumeTrigger: The TaxKit product owner and apps/docs owner choose and record the meaning, permitted use, and transition authority for draft.
